recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.

recommendations.title: Time Trap
recommendations.overview: A group of students become trapped inside a mysterious cave where they discover time passes differently underground than on the surface.

recommendations.title: Lord of the Flies
recommendations.overview: When their plane crashes, 25 schoolboys find themselves trapped on a tropical island, miles from civilization.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: Metropia
recommendations.overview: In the near future, oil reserves are nearly depleted and Europe is connected by series of underground tunnels. While navigating these tunnels, Roger hears voices, one in particular. Seeking a way to rid himself of the voice only leads Roger deeper in

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me Doraemon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Sewashi and Doraemon find themselves way back in time and meet Nobita. It is up to Doraemon to take care of Nobita or else he will not return to the present.

recommendations.title: Justice League: The Flashpoint Paradox

recommendations.overview: The Flash finds himself in a war-torn alternate timeline and teams up with alternate versions of his fellow heroes to restore the timeline.

recommendations.title: Parallels
recommendations.overview: An underground MMA fighter must confront his sister and his past in an adventure through parallel universes
